blockingIssues.description: Dockerfile.onboard-smoke still invokes `npx --yes "paperclipai@${PAPIERKLAMMER_VERSION}" ...`, leaving old package naming in the smoke path and risking onboarding smoke failure against renamed publishing.

Smoke version wiring is inconsistent: scripts/docker-onboard-smoke.sh still passes `PAPERCLIPAI_VERSION` while Dockerfile.onboard-smoke and release workflow use `PAPIERKLAMMER_VERSION`, so requested version propagation is broken.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated .factory/library/environment.md with mission-verified environment facts: missing `rg` tooling and local validation quirks (ENOSPC/transient flake behavior).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Remove hard dependence on `rg` in verification steps; add an explicit fallback path (`grep`/factory tools) and preflight tool-availability check.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple review reports (fork-package-rename, fork-path-cli-rename) observed `rg` missing in this environment and worker deviations from scripted procedure.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Include extensionless infra files (Dockerfiles, workflow scripts) in required rename sweeps to avoid missing old/new token references after extension-based replacements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fork-env-var-rename review noted a second manual pass was required because extension-based matching omitted Dockerfiles.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For schema-only features, allow DB tests under packages/db and relax server-test-path assumptions; clarify when strict tests-first flow is expected vs acceptable schema-first migration sequencing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fork-new-schema-tables and fork-existing-table-columns reviews both found skill guidance mismatched practical DB-schema implementation/testing patterns used in this repo.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated `rg`-missing notes from multiple feature reviews.
Single-run ordering complaint ('bulk rename happened before test creation') for fork-env-var-rename.
